title: Terraprisma Glint
description: Enchantment glint that looks like the Terraprisma's animated effect from Terraria.
body:
This resource pack adds an enchantment glint that looks like the Terraprisma's animated effect from Terraria.

You can see the glint in game [HERE](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JdHF-jmH8pQ)

You can also make your own enchantment glint on [my website](https://mcglint.com/glint)
